property.name: sun.java.command
property.value: /Users/samuelswire/Library/Caches/Coursier/arc/https/github.com/sbt/sbt/releases/download/v1.9.7/sbt-1.9.7.zip/sbt/bin/sbt-launch.jar -info set Test / testOptions += Tests.Argument(TestFrameworks.ScalaTest, "-oC") test scalafmtCheckAll
